text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
You know, there's so many different posters put
up here, I can't help but look at them all.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
The eye-catching layouts, and coloring too! And
somehow they still manage to fit in all the
necessary info, like their social media accounts
and everything!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
They grab your attention and get you interested,
then guide your gaze to convert you into an
actual customer. I could learn a lot from these.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, I know! I could apply these ideas to my
local idol activities!
